tasks.summary: cascade-context page doesn't exist — 5 types reference it via <docs> tags
tasks.details: 5 broken code-docs links point to fundamentals/messages/cascade-context: InitiatingContext, IScopeContext, ICascadeContextEnricher, CascadeContext, plus cascade-context#scope-context from IMessageContext. These cover the scope/security context model that flows through message hops. Entire page needs creation.

tasks.summary: message-context-extraction page doesn't exist — EnvelopeContextExtractor references it
tasks.details: EnvelopeContextExtractor has <docs> tag pointing to fundamentals/messages/message-context-extraction but page doesn't exist.

tasks.summary: event-store.md missing ALL frontmatter — no title, version, category, etc.
tasks.details: Page starts directly with '# Event Store' with no YAML frontmatter. This is a core page that needs full frontmatter for nav, search, and versioning. Needs title, version, category, order, description, tags (event store, append-only, event sourcing, stream, polymorphic, IEventStore, AppendAndWait), codeReferences.

tasks.summary: IEventStore has 10 methods — verify all are documented
tasks.details: IEventStore interface has: AppendAsync (2 overloads), ReadAsync (2 overloads), ReadPolymorphicAsync, GetEventsBetweenAsync, GetEventsBetweenPolymorphicAsync, GetLastSequenceAsync, AppendAndWaitAsync (2 overloads). Need to verify event-store.md covers all 10 methods with correct signatures. The AppendAndWaitAsync methods have onWaiting/onDecisionMade callback params that may be missing from docs.

tasks.summary: System events may be incomplete — verify rebuild + migration events documented
tasks.details: Code has 11 system event types across perspective rebuild (6 events) and migration (5 events), plus 3 enums (MigrationStatus, MigrationStrategy, MigrationFailureReason). Verify system-events.md covers all of these. The rewind events (PerspectiveRewindStarted/Completed) are newer additions.

tasks.summary: IMessageContext ScopeContext and CallerInfo properties may not be fully documented
tasks.details: IMessageContext has ScopeContext (IScopeContext?) and CallerInfo (ICallerInfo?) properties. ScopeContext is described as 'OWNED by message, not AsyncLocal' — this ownership model needs explicit documentation. CallerInfo provides CallerMemberName/FilePath/LineNumber for VSCode jump-to-line. Verify both are covered.

tasks.summary: Envelope registry uses reference identity — verify docs explain this
tasks.details: IEnvelopeRegistry.TryGetEnvelope uses ReferenceEqualityComparer (object reference identity, not .Equals()). This is a non-obvious behavioral detail that could cause bugs if users expect value equality. Docs should explicitly state this.

tasks.summary: Message tag hook modification semantics may not be documented
tasks.details: IMessageTagHook<TAttribute>.OnTaggedMessageAsync returns JsonElement? — returning null means 'pass original', returning a value means 'modify payload'. This null-semantics pattern needs explicit documentation. Also verify hook priority ordering (-100 → 500 ascending) is documented.

tasks.summary: MessageHop structure very complex — verify full documentation
tasks.details: MessageHop has 15+ properties across causation (CausationId, CorrelationId, CausationType), routing (ServiceInstance, Topic, StreamId), processing (PartitionIndex, SequenceNumber, ExecutionStrategy), security (Scope as ScopeDelta), caller info (CallerMemberName/FilePath/LineNumber), diagnostics (Duration, TraceParent). Many use short JSON property names (JSON: 'ty', 'ca', 'co', etc.). This deserves thorough documentation.

tasks.summary: GetCurrentSecurityContext() is [Obsolete] — verify docs reflect deprecation
tasks.details: IMessageEnvelope.GetCurrentSecurityContext() is marked [Obsolete] directing to GetCurrentScope(). The Scope Delta storage pattern (storing changes between hops, not full context) should be explained. Docs should guide users to migrate from SecurityContext to ScopeContext.
ledger.md has no codeReferences in frontmatter. Should reference the in-memory event store implementation files.

tasks.summary: Both folder files missing version, category, description, tags
tasks.details: Both _folder.md files only have title and order. Should add version, category, description, tags with synonyms.

tasks.summary: Code samples across all 14 pages have auto-generated poor metadata
tasks.details: Same pattern as previous sessions — all code samples have 'Demonstrates X' descriptions and garbage word-split tags.

tasks.summary: Tags should include more synonyms for search
tasks.details: Current: 'events, event-sourcing, eventid, immutability'. Add: 'domain events, IEvent, event definition, event design, event versioning, upcasting'.
Current: 'tags, attributes, hooks, notifications, telemetry, metrics, cross-cutting'. Add: 'IMessageTagHook, tag processor, declarative aspects, AOP, message decoration, tag registry'.

sectionSummary: The events and messages sections have 14 content pages. The biggest issues are: (1) cascade-context page doesn't exist but 5 types reference it (IScopeContext, CascadeContext, etc.), (2) event-store.md has NO frontmatter, (3) message-context-extraction page missing, (4) IEventStore's 10-method interface needs full signature verification, (5) MessageHop's 15+ properties and scope delta model need thorough documentation, (6) system events may be incomplete (rewind events are newer). The frontmatter situation is better than perspectives — most pages have it except event-store.md and the folder files. The code sample metadata issue persists across all pages.
